# MVPWay

MVPWay is a rapid MVP development agency founded by Kunal Rai (Founder) and Maneesh Kumar (Co-Founder).

## What We Do
We help startups and businesses build production-ready Minimum Viable Products (MVPs) in weeks, not months.

## Services
- Web Application MVP Development (Next.js, React, TypeScript)
- Mobile App MVP Development (React Native, Expo)
- AI-Powered Product Development (OpenAI, Claude API, LangChain)
- Backend & API Development (Node.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL)
- Launch & Growth Setup (SEO, Analytics, CI/CD)

## Team
- Kunal Rai: Founder — product strategy, full-stack development, startup scaling
- Maneesh Kumar: Co-Founder — system architecture, backend development, AI integration

## Contact
Email: hello@mvpway.com
Website: https://mvpway.com

## Values
Speed without cutting corners. Production-ready code. AI-first approach. Transparent communication.
